title: heleniastrum nudiflorum
intro: Heleniastrum nudiflorum, also known as the Snow Lotus or False Snow Lotus, is a perennial plant native to the high-altitude plateaus of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heleniastrum nudiflorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a dried root or a decoction, and can be consumed as a tea or used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures.
